media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Tekken Tuesday OPEN SESSIONS!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
Anyone can join. Just follow the rules!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗTagsгҖ‘рҹҗә Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: рҹҗәрҹҗҫ Group: #KemoV/#гҒ‘гӮӮV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#ENvtuber
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
For Inquiries вҶ’ info@kemono-friends.jp

entry.title: гҖҗCrab ChampionsгҖ‘Bday battle with Milky QueenгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗCrab ChampionsгҖ‘Bday battle with Milky QueenгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
Let's celebrate Milky's bday with some crab shooting battles!
Milky Queen: https://twitter.com/milkyqueen_idol
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff

entry.title: гҖҗGang BeastsгҖ‘Fighting it out with Shizukou, Reiny, Luca!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗGang BeastsгҖ‘Fighting it out with Shizukou, Reiny, Luca!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
Shizukou: https://twitter.com/Shizukougames Reiny: https://twitter.com/Reiny_ENVT Luca: https://twitter.com/ObariLuca
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entry.title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Tekken Tuesday with Open Sessions and Tourney!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Tekken Tuesday with Open Sessions and Tourney!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions! We are still figuring out how to run our weekly sessions in Tekken 8.
Anyone can join. Just follow the rules!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff

media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions! We are still figuring out how to run our weekly sessions in Tekken 8.
Anyone can join. Just follow the rules!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entry.title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Light practice and Online Rank AwooгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Light practice and Online Rank AwooгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Valentine's Day Customizations and Sessions!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Let's Celebrate Valentine's Day together! Show our love for our favorite characters and show off your custom Valentine's themed custom outfits!
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

рҹҗәгҖҗTagsгҖ‘рҹҗә Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: рҹҗәрҹҗҫ Group: #KemoV/#гҒ‘гӮӮV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#ENvtuber

For Inquiries вҶ’ info@kemono-friends.jp

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Tekken Tuesday OPEN SESSIONS!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions! We are still figuring out how to run our weekly sessions in Tekken 8.
Anyone can join. Just follow the rules!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

media:group.media:title: гҖҗChatting/йӣ‘и«ҮгҖ‘Tasks and Free Talk Time!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entry.title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Day 1: RELEASE DAY! Vtuber plays Tekken Story ModeгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Day 1: RELEASE DAY! Vtuber plays Tekken Story ModeгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
The day has come! Tekken 8 release day and there is so much I want to do! Leo let's go!
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗTagsгҖ‘рҹҗә Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: рҹҗәрҹҗҫ Group: #KemoV/#гҒ‘гӮӮV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#ENvtuber
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
For Inquiries вҶ’ info@kemono-friends.jp

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 7гҖ‘Thank You Tekken 7 PartyгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі7
media:group.media:description:
Thank you Tekken 7! Time to celebrate our time with Tekken 7 before 8 comes out! | There will be fun sessions and tourneys! Come join, everyone is invited as long as the rules below are followed~
How to join sessions 1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer) 2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later) 3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too) 4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!
How to join Tourneys: 1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer) 2. First come, first serve basis 3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc) 4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
